name: annyang
description: A JavaScript library for adding voice commands to your site, using speech recognition
author: Tal Ater <tal@talater.com> (https://www.talater.com/)

scripts.docs: typedoc && cat docs/api-intro.md docs/README.md docs/api-footer.md > docs/README.tmp && mv docs/README.tmp docs/README.md
scripts.test:manual: pnpm build && cp dist/annyang.iife.min.js test-manual/ && npx esbuild test-manual/esm-app.js --bundle --alias:annyang=./dist/annyang.js --outfile=test-manual/dist/esm-app.js && npx esbuild test-manual/cjs-app.js --bundle --alias:annyang=./dist/annyang.cjs --outfile=test-manual/dist/cjs-app.js && npx http-server test-manual -p 8081 -c-1 -o
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm docs
